nasb.text: and they commanded the people, saying, “When you see the ark of the covenant of the Lord your God with the Levitical priests carrying it, then you shall set out from your place and go after it.

esv.text: and commanded the people, “As soon as you see the ark of the covenant of the Lord your God being carried by the Levitical priests, then you shall set out from your place and follow it.

cnv.text: 吩咐人民說：“你們看見耶和華你們的　神的約櫃，又看見抬約櫃的利未支派的祭司的時候，就要從你們所住的地方出發，跟在約櫃後面走。

ccb.text: “你们看见做祭司的利未人抬着你们上帝耶和华的约柜出发时，就要起身跟在后面。
